llm.txt

Name: Ajin Varghese Chandy

Summary

Indie developer focused on building AI-powered products, developer
tools, and educational platforms. Interested in becoming a one-person
product creator capable of building, launching, monetizing, and branding
software independently.

Technical Experience

-   MERN Stack Development (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js)
-   Next.js 15
-   TypeScript and JavaScript
-   Tailwind CSS
-   HTML and CSS
-   Python Development
-   FastAPI Backend Development
-   MVC Architecture
-   Chrome Extension Development
-   FFmpeg and video processing workflows
-   AssemblyAI integrations
-   OCR-based applications
-   Git and modern web development workflows

Areas of Interest

-   AI-assisted software development
-   Vibe coding workflows
-   Product engineering
-   Developer productivity tools
-   Educational technology
-   Video automation
-   Speech and audio processing
-   Compiler and interpreter design
-   Project management systems

Notable Projects

-   AI-powered project management tools
-   Self-editing AI video editor
-   Real-time speech interaction applications
-   Speech rhythm coaching tools
-   Educational programming platforms
-   Video clipping and editing applications
-   Chrome extensions for knowledge retrieval
-   Typing games powered by OCR
-   Student-focused collaboration platforms
-   Rental management systems

Content Creation Interests

-   Long-form educational videos
-   Motivational storytelling content
-   Programming education
-   Technical explainers

Career Direction

-   Focused on the MERN ecosystem
-   Interested in startup creation and indie hacking
-   Building products that solve meaningful problems
-   Exploring the future of software development and AI-enhanced
    engineering
